name: Raisin Honey Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening, granulated sugar, honey, egg, and orange peel.
2. Stir in the flour, baking soda, salt, and oatmeal; beat until well combined.
3. Add the raisins to the dough.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto greased baking sheets.
5. Bake at the oven's center temperature of 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 to 10 minutes, or until evenly browned.
6. Allow the cookies to stand on the sheets for 2 to 3 minutes before transferring them to wire racks to cool.
7. Makes about 36 cookies.
